meta.tagline: Full Stack Engineer · .NET Core · React.js · GCP

hero.stack: React.js · .NET Core · Enterprise Systems · GCP Certified

bio: I am a results-driven Full Stack Developer with 3+ years forging enterprise-grade systems at Ingram Micro, where I've delivered 10+ production REST APIs, slashed onboarding time by 60%, and secured multi-region APAC/EMEA deployments.

Armed with C# .NET Core, React.js, and a GCP certification, I specialize in building performant backend systems and seamless frontends. Like a true Hunter, I adapt to any dungeon — from fintech to enterprise CRM — and clear it with precision and efficiency.

skills.name: C# / .NET Core
skills.desc: Built 10+ production REST APIs with ASP.NET Web API, Entity Framework Core, and LINQ at Ingram Micro.

skills.name: ASP.NET Web API
skills.desc: Designed and shipped enterprise-grade Web APIs with clean architecture, middleware pipelines, and global error handling.

skills.name: Entity Framework Core
skills.desc: Managed complex domain models, migrations, and query optimizations using EF Core with SQL Server.

skills.name: SQL Server / T-SQL
skills.desc: Designed relational schemas, wrote complex stored procedures & T-SQL, optimised queries for 35%+ perf gain.

skills.name: React.js
skills.desc: Crafted enterprise frontends with React 18, hooks, context, and state management patterns.

skills.name: JavaScript / ES2022+
skills.desc: Deep mastery of modern JS including async/await, destructuring, optional chaining, and module systems.

skills.name: TypeScript
skills.desc: Strongly typed React & Node.js projects with interfaces, generics, and strict null checks.

skills.name: HTML5 / CSS3
skills.desc: Built responsive, accessible UIs with semantic HTML5, Flexbox, Grid, and custom CSS animations.

skills.name: GCP (ACE Certified 2024)
skills.desc: GCP ACE certified. Deployed multi-region services across APAC & EMEA using GKE, Cloud Run, and Cloud SQL.

skills.name: Azure
skills.desc: Provisioned Azure App Services, Storage, and Azure AD for enterprise deployments.

skills.name: Dynamics 365 / Power Automate
skills.desc: Extended D365 modules for 1,000+ global users, built Power Automate flows for onboarding pipelines.

skills.name: JWT / OAuth 2.0
skills.desc: Implemented enterprise auth flows, OWASP-hardened APIs, and multi-org SSO integrations.

skills.name: OWASP Practices
skills.desc: Applied OWASP Top 10 mitigations: SQL injection prevention, XSS sanitisation, rate limiting, and secure headers.

skills.name: HTTPS / TLS
skills.desc: Enforced HTTPS everywhere, configured TLS termination, certificate rotation, and HSTS policies.

achievements: Architected & delivered 10+ production-grade REST APIs using ASP.NET Web API + Entity Framework Core.
Reduced employee onboarding time by 60% by building an automation pipeline with Redis & Hangfire.
Improved critical API response times by 35%+ through query optimization and caching strategies.
Secured multi-region OAuth 2.0 deployments across APAC & EMEA with OWASP-compliant auth flows.
Extended Microsoft Dynamics 365 modules serving 1,000+ global enterprise users.
Built real-time notification system using SignalR and Azure Service Bus.
Contributed to backend microservices in .NET Core for procurement analytics platform.
Wrote stored procedures and optimized SQL Server queries for large-scale data pipelines.
Collaborated in Agile sprints to deliver features for enterprise procurement clients.

projects.title: Enterprise CRM Platform
projects.desc: End-to-end CRM platform serving 1,000+ global enterprise users across APAC & EMEA. Features multi-region deployments, OAuth 2.0 SSO, real-time notifications, and Power Automate integrations.

projects.title: AlgoVisualizer
projects.desc: Interactive algorithm visualizer featuring 15+ sorting & pathfinding algorithms with step-by-step animation. Deployed with full CI/CD pipeline on Netlify.
